title: strychnos aenea
intro: Strychnos aenea, also known as the yellow nux vomica tree, is a plant species belonging to the Loganiaceae family and is native to tropical Africa. It has been traditionally used in medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, analgesic, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits associated with Strychnos aenea include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating various infections. The plant is often prepared into herbal remedies such as infusions, decoctions, and ointments, which can be applied topically or consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties.
